description: Case style: Analog watch with a round stainless steel case and a silver bezel with black edgeDial style: Silver dial with black handsStrap style: Black genuine leather strap with a patent leather finish and tang clasp for comfort and styleFeatures: Branding on the 3 hour mark on the dialScrew to reset timeWater resistance upto 30 meters, allowing you to wear it out in the rain Warranty: 1 year
